channel.title: World Bank Group Job Vacancies
channel.description: List of vacancies at the World Bank Group

item.title: IT Officer, Business Solutions I (Associate Experience Design Officer)
item.description: World Bank Group has a vacancy for the position of IT Officer, Business Solutions I (Associate Experience Design Officer) Location: Washington, DC.

item.description: World Bank Group has a vacancy for the position of Regional Industry Manager, FIG, Asia & Pacific Location: Washington, DC.
